The '''Phosphura Belt Nebula''' was a [[nebula]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories]]' [[Atravis sector]]<ref name="Appendix" /> that was the site of [[Zirtran's Anchor]].<ref name="Smuggler's Guide" />

{{Neb-stub}}
